designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — dark theme, midnight blue, OLED-friendly, high contrast, with animated conic gradients for generative tapestry art

keyFeatures: Live ritual banner with animated tapestry gradient on home screen
Real-time conversational weaving UI with AI Loom Weaver responses
Animated conic-gradient tapestry canvas that cycles through 4 generative states
Influence action pills (More Vibrant, Minor Key, Glitch, etc.) for real-time art direction
Echo Tapestry gallery with like toggle, featured badges, and 3D spatial explore mode
Guild discovery with search, join/request flow, aesthetic tags, and live ritual indicators
Light/dark theme toggle with full color system transition
